name: BulkDataV2CapabilityDeclaresExport
title: Bulk Data v2 — CapabilityStatement declares an export operation
description: Per Bulk Data Access IG v2, servers SHOULD declare export operations in their CapabilityStatement so clients can discover Bulk Data support without trial-and-error. FHIR CapabilityStatement declares operations as `operation.name` (without the `$` prefix) with a canonical `operation.definition` URL. This test matches either the canonical Bulk Data OperationDefinition URL (http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/bulkdata/OperationDefinition/...) OR an operation entry named export/patient-export/group-export.

relatedArtifact.label: Bulk Data v2 — server capability documentation

assert.label: responseBody declares an export OperationDefinition or operation.name
